items.title: Gunmen kill 10 people in town in Mexico’s Puebla state, authorities say
items.summary: The victims were six men, three women, and a child, and all were shot in the early hours of May 17

items.title: Mexican officials announce 10 dead in early-morning shooting in Tehuitzingo
items.summary: Officials blamed the shooting on 'armed individuals', though no details were provided about attackers or their motives.
